creator: rsecor@seqlogic.com
text:
Update to 1.77.
Version 1.74 is no longer available for download.

Fix: 

Change:
PORTVERSION=    1.74
to
PORTVERSION=    1.77
and add 1.77 to distinfo with appropriate MD5, SHA256 & SIZE.
How-To-Repeat: When /usr/ports/distfiles/MailTools-1.74.tar.gz is not already present on your system:
cd /usr/ports/mail/p5-Mail-Tools 
make
